description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD' and 'PREMIUM GRAPE NECTAR FROM GRAPE CONCENTRATE' on the front, with a vivid image of a bunch of red grapes and green leaves. The packaging is predominantly white with gold accents, including a vertical gold stripe on one side and gold text. One side of the carton displays a barcode, recycling information, and a logo, while another side features detailed nutritional facts and product information in both English and Arabic. The top of the carton is sealed and features a small, round, yellow spot, likely indicating a pull tab or puncture point for opening. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, with a glossy finish and clear branding.
description: A white and gold rectangular juice carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD' with a grape cluster illustration and detailed product information on the sides.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the carton with a barcode, recycling logo, and a gold vertical stripe.
description_view_1: This is the front view, displaying the 'FARAGELLO GOLD' branding and a large grape cluster illustration.
description_view_2: This side features a bold gold vertical stripe with the word 'FARAGELLO' and 'PREMIUM GRAPE NECTAR' at the bottom.
description_view_3: This view shows the back with extensive product and nutritional information in English and Arabic, plus a small grape illustration.
